evidence.snippet: As the demand for Unmanned Vehicle Systems (UxVs) increases, so does the need for a wider range of antennas for payloads, data communications systems, command and control. Performance requirements and cost criteria are an important consideration when selecting the antenna.

items.notes: Antennas explicitly for UxV payloads, data communications, and command and control

products_categories.notes: Primary UxV-relevant category is communications (antennas). Broadcast RF portfolio not marketed to drone supply chain.

headquarters.notes: UK confirmed by +44(0) 1293 area code (Crawley, West Sussex region). No city/address explicitly stated on fetched pages; about-us page was skipped.

evidence.snippet: Videosys has a range of standard cost-effective, high-performance antenna designs that are already used on UxVs across the globe

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Videosys supplies antennas (components) to UxV manufacturers and operators for payload, data comms, and C2 applications. Primary business is broadcast RF systems; UxV antenna line is a named secondary product.

items.name: UxV Antennas
items.product_type: Antenna range for unmanned vehicle systems

evidence.snippet: Videosys has a range of standard cost-effective, high-performance antenna designs that are already used on UxVs across the globe

items.notes: Standard antenna designs used on UxVs globally for payload, data comms, and command and control

items.name: Custom Antenna Design
items.product_type: Bespoke antenna design and manufacturing service

evidence.snippet: Videosys offers a bespoke antenna design service.  Be that a new design for a special frequency requirement or specialised mounting arrangements, Videosys has the expertise to design and manufacture in house to short time scales.

**Epsilon 4K Camera Control Unit:** Videosys Broadcast’s Epsilon 4K Camera Control Unit (CCU) is designed to simplify Radio Camera installation, making it suited to both indoor and outdoor sporting events, particularly those where a fast set up time and secure transmission must be guaranteed.

items.name: CA-75HD
items.product_type: Ikegami camera back / camera side panel

products.notes: UxV Antennas and Custom Antenna Design are the explicitly UxV-targeted products. Other SKUs are broadcast-focused named products in their catalog.

ndaa.notes: No NDAA-related claims found in any fetched page. UK-based broadcast company; NDAA compliance not relevant to their primary market.

blue_uas.notes: No Blue UAS claims found in any fetched page.

evidence.snippet: Videosys has a range of standard cost-effective, high-performance antenna designs that are already used on UxVs across the globe

readiness.notes: Standard catalog antenna designs already deployed on UxVs globally. Custom design service is a secondary offering.

tagline: UK-based RF communications supplier specializing in wireless video transmission systems, antennas, and camera control units for broadcast and film production. Core products include TX160 HEVC transmitter, UxV antenna family, and Connected Live System. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown. Primary market appears to be commercial broadcast; US defense/UAS integration unclear from public evidence.
